ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Client's physical address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Client's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial dataset */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_datasets_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data belongs to */,
  "k4" REAL /* Key financial ratio k4 */,
  "k6" REAL /* Key financial ratio k6 */,
  "k12" REAL /* Key financial ratio k12 */,
  "k18" REAL /* Key financial ratio k18 */,
  "k30" REAL /* Key financial ratio k30 */,
  "k4_g" REAL /* Growth rate of k4 */,
  "k6_g" REAL /* Growth rate of k6 */,
  "k12_g" REAL /* Growth rate of k12 */,
  "k18_g" REAL /* Growth rate of k18 */,
  "k30_g" REAL /* Growth rate of k30 */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data (e.g., API, manual upload) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., finance, accounting) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry the annotation is linked to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or annotation text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the alert is linked to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
